themes.reasoning_notes: ETB puts a -1/-1 counter on any creature, functioning as small creature removal or shrink-based interaction.
Artifact creature body can matter for artifact-count and recursion shells beyond its ETB interaction.
ETB puts a -1/-1 counter on a target creature, giving modest one-shot creature interaction rather than a dedicated removal spell.
It is an artifact creature, so it can contribute to artifact-count, recursion, or artifact-synergy shells, though that is secondary to its ETB effect.
